title: FireAlarmDevice
description: FireAlarmDevice: A device used to warn building occupants of emergencies (smoke, fire, carbon monoxide) by means of audio or visual appliances (smoke detectors, speaker strobes, heat detectors.)

Location.description: The point in space for the location of the object. Node: 0D finite element for structural analysis. Node class contains positional information as well as orientation and support.

OrientationAngle.description: Controls the local plan orientation of the object. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

FireAlarmDeviceType.description: A type which describes the fire alarm device more specifically whether it's a smoke detector, carbon monoxide detector or speaker strobe. FireAlarmDeviceType: A type of fire alarm device (smoke detector, heat detector, speaker strobe.)

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
